provenance.license: Derived from the Discogs monthly CC0 data dumps. See docs/DATA_AND_RIGHTS.md.
provenance.note: Derived from a bounded one-hop working set; the private collection seed used to build that working set is never published. The album list is an editorial selection, not a ranking.
